title: Repay the archive growth budget for the release archive repair Work Item

sources.reason: The required template-smoke check reports archiveGrowth=481 exceeds configured maximum 480.
Required template-smoke failed only because the immutable archive count exceeded the reserved budget by one.

rawUserRequest: 修复发布归档 PR 暴露的 archiveGrowth=481 超过预算 480 问题，按完整 Work Item、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步流程完成；保留已有生命周期记录。

declaredIntent.summary: Repay the one-record archive growth reservation required by the merged release archive repair Work Item.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: The failing CI evidence identifies one bounded policy value to repay.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the new archiveGrowth maximum equals the observed immutable archive count and no records are removed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: archiveGrowth maximum is raised from 480 to 481 with an explicit repayment record.
The governance complexity check reports no budget violation at archiveGrowth 481.
No existing archive or lifecycle record is removed or rewritten.
guidelines: Preserve immutable Work Item lifecycle evidence.
Record bounded archive budget repayment in the governance policy.

intent.problem: The required template-smoke check failed because the newly archived release archive repair Work Item increased archiveGrowth to 481 while the reserved maximum remained 480.
constraints: Change only the governance complexity budget policy and this Work Item evidence.
Do not delete or rewrite existing archive records.
Keep the increase bounded to the observed one-record growth.
intent.rationale: The policy must reflect the immutable evidence already present; a one-record explicit repayment preserves the fail-closed guard without hiding growth.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized completion of the current plan and its required governance budget repayment.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
